title: alnus × spuria subsp. beckii
intro: Alnus × spuria subsp. beckii is a hybrid plant, also known as a green alder, which is a cross between the green alder (Alnus viridis) and the white alder (Alnus glutinosa) and belongs to the family Betulaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Alnus × spuria subsp. beckii include its ability to help reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and even support the cardiovascular system. Alnus × spuria subsp. beckii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
